full_text:
Dong Chong 董重
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Chong (董重)was born in Hejian. Served Han as General of the Flying Cavalry. Lady Dong’s brother. Dong Chong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Dong Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
